name: Carrot- Apricot Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried apricots in the nectar overnight.
2. Place 1 jar of drained carrots into a two-quart casserole dish.
3. Top with half the apricots, half the apricot nectar, and 1/4 cup brown sugar.
4. Dot with 2 tablespoons butter, repeat layers.
5. Sprinkle with almonds.
6. Bake, covered, at 350 degrees for 30 minutes, or until bubbly.
